goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 16:30'.
The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'emmanuel college'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 16:30
The train should go to stevenage and should leave on monday
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called emmanuel college
Make sure you get area and phone number
